programmes.show_name: The Wham Bam Easter Party Week!
programmes.show_description: A non-stop ticket to a week of retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.
Funk, soul, Hi-NRG, new jack swing and house took dance in all sorts of new directions during the '80s, and Radio 1's Friday night 'Big Beat' DJ Jeff Young was there!

Strap yourself in as Andy takes you back to late 80s teatime on BBC1 - Blue Peter, Grange Hill & Neighbours - plus 30 of the very best feel-good chart bangers from that era!

programmes.show_name: The Wham Bam Easter Party Week!

Duncan James and his band Blue represented the UK in 2011 - coming 11th! But there have been far bigger winners and losers over 50 years - here are 2 hours of highs - and lows!

programmes.show_name: The Wham Bam Easter Party Week!

Every so often a video came along that set new high (and low) standards of dance, or kicked off an often short-lived new dance craze! Here's the '80s - dance by dance.
Bruno Brookes has stories galore from 20 of rock and pop's real game changers. Icons, rebels, activists & a few of the more unexpected heroes who reshaped music & the media.
The year of Brothers in Arms, Live Aid and the first Stock, Aitken & Waterman number 1!

Lesser known songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!
Your eighties party channel - all Easter weekend! Expect synth pop, soft rock, cheesy tunes and lots of big hair! #NOW80s.

programmes.show_name: Make Mine A Double with Pat Sharp!
programmes.show_description: They say 2 heads are better than one & in the 80s the charts were full of collaborations. So pour a large one & have double the fun with Pat Sharp's top 40 duets.
